meta.title: COOci Dev Academy | Course Registration
meta.description: Register for COOci Dev Academy courses in programming, web design, game development, 3D, full-stack development, and startup building.
meta.ogDesc: Project-based learning from beginner to professional level with free consultation and online application.

hero.title: Your path to growth and success
hero.subtitle: Learn, build, and earn
hero.support: From beginner to professional, we support every step.
hero.note: COOci Dev Academy is built for students, young learners, and parents who want a clear and trackable learning path.

video.title: See the COOci Dev Academy learning path from the inside.
video.subtitle: A short look at the courses, projects, and student growth path.

why.title: Real education for real portfolio outcomes.
why.subtitle: The academy focuses on step-by-step learning, presentable projects, and consultation for choosing the right path.

cards.title: Personalized path
cards.body: From quick start to full-stack, game development, 3D, and startup building, the right path is selected based on your level and goal.

cards.title: Practice with visible results
cards.body: Every course ends with a project, portfolio piece, or product you can use in your resume and presentations.

cards.title: Support for students and parents
cards.body: An education consultant clarifies progress, current level, and course selection for both students and parents.

courses.title: Choose the right course from your first project to professional skills.
courses.subtitle: All courses are designed around projects, hands-on practice, and a clear route to portfolio building.
courses.note: Click Apply on any course to prepare the form below with that course selected.

path.title: A simple map from interest to income.
path.subtitle: In the consultation session, we identify your current level and suggest the right course for your next step.
items: Understand interest, age, available time, and learning goal.
Choose the right course at beginner, intermediate, or advanced level.
Learn skills through short practices and staged projects.
Build a presentable output for a resume, portfolio, or product.
Receive feedback, improve the project, and prepare for the next path.

benefits.title: Clear, project-based, and easy to track.
benefits.subtitle: Courses are designed for real skill growth, confidence, and better decisions about a digital future.

items.title: Professional instructors
items.body: Training by instructors with real market and delivery experience.

items.title: Project-based learning
items.body: A focus on building, practicing, and creating visible outcomes.

items.title: Income-ready skills
items.body: Programming, web design, game development, and product building with a market mindset.

items.title: Path support
items.body: Guidance and answers throughout learning and choosing the next step.

items.title: Completion certificate
items.body: A completion certificate after finishing projects and exercises.

items.title: Beginner to professional path
items.body: Connected courses for steady, measurable, goal-oriented growth.

contact.title: Consultation and course registration form
contact.subtitle: After you complete the form, an email draft opens so you can review and send it.

email.label: Email
email.helper: If you enter an email, use a valid email format.

message.label: Message
message.placeholder: Write your goal, question, or preferred call time.

contact.consent: I agree to be contacted by a COOci Dev education consultant.
contact.ok: The email draft is ready. Please review it and click Send.
contact.fail: If your email app did not open, use the copy options.

fallback.title: Your email is ready
fallback.body: Open the email first. If your email app does not open, copy the destination and prepared message.

faq.title: What should you know before applying?

items.q: Do I need previous experience to start?
items.a: No. Beginner courses are designed for starting from zero, and advanced courses are recommended after consultation.

items.q: Which course is right for my child?
items.a: Enter age and goal in the form so the academy consultant can suggest the right path.

items.q: What happens after I submit the form?
items.a: Your request is sent to the education consultant, who will contact you for consultation, scheduling, and final registration.

footer.tagline: COOci Dev Academy guides the learning path for digital skills from beginner to professional.
footer.privacy: This form works without a backend and only prepares an email draft in your email app.
